data.description:

data.title: U.S. Inflation Data and Consumer Confidence Index Set for Release
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the U.S. core PCE price index for July is scheduled to be released at 20:30 UTC+8, followed by the final August Michigan Consumer Sentiment Index at 22:00. Forecasts suggest a 0.3% month-on-month increase in the PCE price index, consistent with the previous month. If accurate, this would raise the year-on-year PCE inflation rate from 2.8% to 2.9%, marking the highest level since February and the third consecutive monthly rise. Economists indicate that persistent high inflation could limit the scope for further interest rate cuts later this year. Some analysts believe that only a significant increase in the August CPI inflation data, due in two weeks, might prompt the Federal Reserve to reconsider its rate cut plans during the meeting on September 16-17.

data.title: Ethereum Price Analysis: Key Support Levels Identified
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, cryptocurrency analyst Lennaert Snyder has identified critical support levels for Ethereum. Snyder suggests that the next significant support for Ethereum is at $4,270. If Ethereum can confirm holding this level, it may be a favorable point to consider long positions.

Snyder advises that if the $4,270 support fails, traders might consider short positions. Additionally, deeper liquidity is noted around the $3,950 mark, which could be an area of interest for long positions if reversal signals appear.

data.title: Jingtai Holdings Completes HKD 2.65 Billion Share Placement
data.description: According to Foresight News, Jingtai Holdings, a company listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, has finalized the pricing for a new share placement, raising HKD 2.65 billion. The placement price is set at HKD 9.28 per share, representing a premium of approximately 75.8% over the initial public offering price. The funds raised will be allocated towards company operations, product development, mergers and acquisitions, and exploring innovative financial tools such as real-world assets (RWA) and real data assets (RDA). Additionally, the company plans to develop new blockchain business initiatives.

data.title: Binance to Suspend Conflux Network Transactions for Upgrade
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, starting from 2025-09-01 00:03 (UTC), the platform will temporarily suspend deposits and withdrawals of tokens on the Conflux Network (CFX) to facilitate a network upgrade and hard fork. This upgrade is scheduled to occur at Epoch Number 129,680,000. The trading of tokens on the Conflux Network will remain unaffected during this period, ensuring that users can continue their trading activities without interruption.

Binance assures users that it will manage all technical requirements related to the upgrade, aiming to provide a seamless experience. Once the network is deemed stable post-upgrade, deposits and withdrawals will be reopened. Binance has decided not to issue further announcements regarding the reopening of these services, emphasizing the importance of monitoring the network's stability before resuming operations. Users are encouraged to stay informed through the project team's announcements for any additional updates related to the network upgrade.
